The '''TDL-501 unipod waitress droid''' was a [[Service droid/Legends|service droid]] developed by [[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]] shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The TDL-501 was manufactured to compete with the [[WA-7 waitress droid/Legends|WA-7 service unit]]. It did enjoy moderate success but was later outdated.

One droid of this series worked in the cantina of the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7|RMSU-7]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. When the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] broke down, the XY-90 component was required immediately. ''Teedle'' had this component and she let the technical experts extract it to repair the breakdown.

[[Den Dhur]] was upset by this at first, but soon realized that she had been put to good use.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
